description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low stone wall and landscaped with palm trees at the perimeter. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels and skylights, and a combination of white and natural wood exterior finishes. Large glass windows and sliding doors dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor spaces. The front includes a prominent garage with a dark gray door and a main entrance with a glass-panel door. The backyard area is partially enclosed with a pergola and features a paved patio, while the side yard includes additional paved walkways and open space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic typical of contemporary architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and wood finishes, large glass windows, and landscaped with palm trees, surrounded by a stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance with glass door, and a row of palm trees along the front wall.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio, pergola structure, and grouped windows facing the garden.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the extensive glass windows and sliding doors, as well as the open side yard and stone wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage side, additional paved areas, and a clear view of the flat roof's multiple levels.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
